description: A new sales tax jurisdiction needs to be configured for New York. Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo). Create a new sales tax named 'NY Combined Sales Tax 8.875%' with a 'Sales' type and an amount of 8.875%. Configure the products 'Office Standing Desk' and 'Ergonomic Task Chair' to use only this new tax, removing any existing customer taxes. Create and post a customer invoice for 'Riverside Office Solutions' containing 4 units of 'Office Standing Desk' and 6 units of 'Ergonomic Task Chair'.
